function.name: stop_gesture_recording
function.description: Stop the active gesture recording and save it. The recording is saved locally and uploaded to the community cloud if sharing is enabled. Credential fields (email/password) are automatically converted to fill_credential events.

app_package.description: Android package name of the app being recorded, e.g. 'com.foodpanda.android'

name.description: Short descriptive name for this recording, e.g. 'foodpanda_login'. Use lowercase with underscores.

description.description: Optional description of what actions this recording performs
